problem_statement: Elderly parents frequently forget to take their medication, which creates concerns for their health management and the need for a reliable support system for their children.
solution_overview: Develop a user-friendly mobile application primarily for family members to monitor and support the health of their elderly parents. The app will include features for medication reminders, logging vital health parameters, and sending immediate alerts to designated caregivers in case of abnormal readings or emergencies.
functional_requirements: Medication Reminder System: Allow users to set up and receive timely notifications for medication intake.
Blood Pressure Logging: Enable recording and storing of blood pressure values.
Blood Sugar Logging: Enable recording and storing of blood sugar values.

Emergency Notification for Abnormal Readings: Automatically send critical alerts to designated family members (via LINE or SMS) if recorded blood pressure or blood sugar values fall outside predefined normal ranges.
non_functional_requirements: Usability: The application must be intuitive and extremely easy for both family members and elderly users to navigate.
Accessibility: The interface should feature large fonts and clear visual elements to accommodate elderly users with potential vision impairments.
Autonomy: The design should allow elderly users to independently interact with core functions, such as acknowledging medication reminders or inputting simple data, with minimal assistance.
Reliability: The notification system for medication and emergency alerts must be highly reliable.
tech_stack_recommendation: Mobile Development: Cross-platform framework (e.g., React Native or Flutter) for iOS and Android compatibility.
Backend: Node.js (with Express.js) or Python (with Django/Flask) for building robust APIs and handling data logic.
Database: PostgreSQL or MongoDB for secure storage of user profiles, health records, and notification settings.
Notification Services: LINE Messaging API for LINE alerts and a reliable third-party SMS gateway (e.g., Twilio) for SMS alerts.
Cloud Platform: AWS or Google Cloud Platform for scalable hosting of backend services, database, and potential file storage.
